props.description: Visible label. */ label: string; /** Link target. Omit on the current (last) page. */ href?: string; /** Render a home glyph before the label (typically the first item). */ home?: boolean; } </script>  <script lang="ts"> /** Breadcrumb — a navigation trail (`<nav><ol>`) from the site root to the current page. Linked ancestors are underlined; the last item is the current page (`aria-current="page"`, rendered in the selection color, not a link).  Items are data-driven via `items`; mark the first with `home: true` for a leading home glyph. Separators are decorative. Themeable via `--ds-breadcrumb-*`.
